name: BMad Core Module
description: Core settings used across all installed bmad skills, workflows, and agents
init_intro:
BMad Core Configuration
Configure the core settings for your BMad installation.
These settings will be used across all installed bmad skills, workflows, and agents.

user_name.prompt: What should agents call you? (Use your name or a team name)

communication_language.prompt: What language should agents use when chatting with you?

output_folder.prompt: Where should output files be saved?
